scripts.build: bun run build:wgpu && bun run build:ui && bun build packages/cli/src/cli.ts --compile ${BUN_TARGET:+--target=$BUN_TARGET} --define HANCE_VERSION="'${HANCE_VERSION:-dev}'" --outfile hance
scripts.release:local: HANCE_VERSION=${HANCE_VERSION:-0.0.0-local} bun run build && bun run scripts/stage-release.ts && bun run scripts/pack-local.ts
